{{Quote|I just want to buy some time to evacuate my crew and scuttle the ship. That's all I ask.|Hannser on the ''Far Thunder'' in 28 ABY|<ref name="destiny">''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]''</ref>}}
'''Hannser''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] officer who served within the [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]].

==Biography==
During the [[Black Fleet Crisis]] of [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]], he was part of [[Colonel/Legends|Colonel]] [[Ejagga Pakkpekatt]]'s task force that was sent to locate and gather information regarding the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. During this mission, he commanded the [[Gunship/Legends|gunship]] [[Marauder (Warrior-class)|''Marauder'']].

During the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]], [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] Hannser served as the [[Commanding officer/Legends|commanding officer]] of the [[Republic-class cruiser|''Republic''-class cruiser]] ''[[Far Thunder]]''. Under the leadership of [[General/Legends|General]] [[Keyan Farlander/Legends|Keyan Farlander]], he and the warship under his command participated in the [[Second Battle of Obroa-skai|Battle of Obroa-skai]], during which his vessel sustained heavy damage. Lobbying hard for an attempt to salvage the ''Far Thunder'', he succeeded in his efforts, only to see the ship attacked by a party of [[Yuuzhan Vong]] [[Yorik-et|coralskippers]].

While [[Twin Suns Squadron]] under the command of [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] [[Jaina Solo Fel|Jaina Solo]] was able to force the coralskippers into retreat, the ''Far Thunder'' was scuttled by the [[Lancer-class frigate/Legends|''Lancer''-class frigate]] ''[[Whip Hand]]''. Evacuated to the frigate, Hannser was deeply wounded by the loss of his ship.

==Personality and traits==
Hannser was a competent captain and loyal to the New Republic and his crew, regardless of the vessel he was commanding. Although he valued his vessel highly, as in the case of the ''Far Thunder'', he was sensible enough to realize when to abandon a foolish course of action.

==Behind the scenes==
Hannser first appears in the [[The Black Fleet Crisis|''Black Fleet Crisis'']] novel ''[[Before the Storm]]'', written by [[Michael P. Kube-McDowell]] and published in [[1996]]. He later makes an appearance in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars: The New Jedi Order|''New Jedi Order'']] novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Destiny's Way]]'' by [[Walter Jon Williams]].

Although Hannser made no more canon appearances outside of these novels, his character was later given entries in the ''[[Star Wars Encyclopedia]]'' and the [[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia|''Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia'']].
